description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Development that runs on a workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input and on push events to all branches except release/**. The workflow should have a job that runs on a Docker environment with specific permissions, cleans up old Docker resources, checks out the repository at a specified commit or tag, configures AWS credentials, logs in to AWS and GCP registries, builds Docker images with a specific tag, and pushes the images to both registries.
